Title: Enacts the remedial construction of New York labor law act
Summary: Provides that the New York labor law shall be construed liberally for the accomplishment of its remedial purposes, regardless of whether similarly-worded provisions of federal laws or regulations have been or continue to be construed otherwise.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the labor law, in relation to enacting the "remedial construction of New York labor law act of 2026"
